questionHtml:
Which combination will produce an alkaline buffer in water?

A.  0.10 mol NH3 and 0.05 mol H2SO4

B.  0.50 mol NH3 and 0.10 mol H2SO4

C.  0.10 mol CH3COOH and 0.05 mol NaOH

D.  0.10 mol CH3COOH and 0.50 mol NaOH

meta.title: Which combination will produce an alkaline buffer in water? A. 0.10 mol NH3 and 0.05 mol H2SO4 B. 0.50 mol NH3 and 0.10 mol H2SO4 C. 0.10 mol CH3COOH and 0.05 mol NaOH D. 0.10 mol
